basic.name: Navneet Gunda
basic.title: Senior DevOps Engineer
basic.bio:
DevOps Engineer with hands-on expertise in building scalable CI/CD pipelines, cloud infrastructure, and release automation. I specialize in streamlining software delivery using Azure DevOps, GitHub, and Microsoft Azure to ensure fast, reliable, and efficient deployments.
I have experience modernizing legacy pipelines, integrating automated QA testing, and managing multi-environment releases with high stability. My focus is on reducing manual effort, improving deployment success rates, and enabling continuous delivery at scale.
I also leverage AI tools to design and deploy AI agents that enhance automation and operational efficiency, bringing intelligent workflows into DevOps practices.
Driven by a continuous improvement mindset, I work at the intersection of development, QA, and operations to deliver resilient and high-performing systems.

experience.title: Senior DevOps Engineer
experience.description:
Logility: AI-Powered Supply Chain Planning & Optimization 

Logility is a comprehensive, AI-first supply chain planning platform designed to accelerate digital transformation, enhance decision-making, and build resilient, sustainable supply chains. As a subsidiary of Aptean (formerly American Software, Inc.),

Built and managed CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps and GitHub, automating build, test, and deployments
Migrated legacy pipelines and integrated automated QA testing for faster, reliable releases
Managed multi-environment deployments (Dev, QA, UAT, Prod) with high stability
Worked on cloud infrastructure using Microsoft Azure
Automated workflows using scripting (Python, Bash, PowerShell)
Leveraged AI tools to build and deploy AI agents, improving automation and operational efficiency
Monitored systems and resolved deployment issues ensuring high availability
highlights: Built scalable CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps and GitHub
Migrated legacy release pipelines to modern automated workflows
Enabled end-to-end automation for build, test, and deployment processes
Managed multi-environment releases (Dev, QA, UAT, Prod) with high reliability
Worked on cloud infrastructure using Microsoft Azure
Automated operational tasks using Python, Bash, and PowerShell
Integrated automated QA testing into CI/CD pipelines
Leveraged AI tools to build and deploy AI agents for process automation
Improved deployment efficiency and reduced manual intervention
Ensured system stability through monitoring and rapid issue resolution

experience.title: DevOps Engineer
experience.description:
• Automated infrastructure provisioning with Terraform and Ansible, achieving a 60% reduction in manual effort.  
• Developed CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and Azure DevOps, enhancing deployment frequency from weekly to daily.  
• Integrated centralized logging and monitoring with ELK and Azure Monitor for improved system visibility.
Azure services, including Compute, Networking, Storage, AKS, App Services, and Serverless.
implementing and maintaining security best practices, such as identity management and RBAC.
troubleshooting production issues and driving incident resolution.
highlights: • Designed and deployed scalable CI/CD pipelines in Azure DevOps, significantly enhancing deployment frequency.
• Implemented Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using Terraform and ARM templates, automating provisioning processes.
• Managed containerized applications with Docker and Kubernetes (AKS), ensuring efficient resource utilization.
• Integrated monitoring solutions with Azure Monitor and ELK Stack, improving system reliability and performance.

AI Technologies & Tools.name: LLMs & Assistants: OpenAI (ChatGPT), Google Gemini, Anthropic Claude
New SkillCode Generation & Review: GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT for scripting, debugging, and automation
Monitoring & AIOps: AI-driven log analysis, anomaly detection, and alert optimization
AI Agents & Workflows: Building and deploying AI agents using APIs, automation tools, and orchestration frameworks

certifications.name: Microsoft Certified: Azure Data Engineer Associate

projects.title: Adaptive Traffic Signal Control System
projects.description: Developed an intelligent traffic management system using machine learning algorithms to dynamically adjust signal timings based on real-time traffic density, reducing average wait times significantly.

projects.title: Rural Water Supply Scheme
projects.description: Designed and implemented an automated monitoring system for rural water supply infrastructure, enabling remote tracking of pump performance, water levels, and distribution efficiency.

projects.title: DevOps Pipeline Automation Framework
projects.description: Built a reusable CI/CD pipeline framework using GitHub Actions and Azure DevOps for containerized microservices, including automated testing, security scanning, and multi-environment deployments.

blog.title: AI-Driven Supply Chain Optimization: Bridging DevOps and Demand Planning
blog.excerpt: A practical deep dive into how DevOps practices combined with AI can transform supply chain systems, enabling real-time demand forecasting, automated deployments, and scalable infrastructure for high-demand scenarios.
